---
title: "Week 4 — Comparing groups"
toc: true
---

> **Status:** placeholder. Real content will be developed during the
> course build.

## Big question

How do outcomes differ across groups?

## Day-by-day

### Monday — concept

Comparing distributions and proportions across groups; difference in
means and difference in proportions as descriptive quantities.

### Wednesday — micro-lab ticket

Treatment-vs-control comparison: compute and describe a difference,
without inference.

### Friday — quiz / application

Quiz mirroring Wednesday's micro-lab on a new scenario; brief
application on practical vs numerical significance.

## Primary source basis

OpenIntro IMS Ch 4–5 (descriptive parts), plus the descriptive halves
of IMS Ch 17 (two proportions) and Ch 20–21 (two means / paired) split
out for use here.

## Supplemental source / custom needs

Treatment / control framing; ISLBS biomedical examples once mirrored.

## Learning goals

Students should be able to:

- [ ] Compute and interpret simple group differences.
- [ ] Distinguish numerical difference from practical importance.
- [ ] Describe group comparisons with appropriate context.

## Assessment links

Links to the bank/manifests for this week will appear here once items
are built.

- Micro-lab ticket: TBD
- Friday quiz: TBD
- Homework: TBD
